methods.name: ResetEngine(bool)
methods.summary: Call this method to reset the virtual machine, avoiding a race condition by using a thread join inside the vm executive.

params.name: markNodesAsDirty
params.doc: Set this parameter to true to force reset of the execution substrate. Note that setting this parameter to true will have a negative performance impact.

methods.summary: Backup all the files

methods.name: ShutDown(bool)
methods.summary: External components call this method to shutdown DynamoModel. This method marks 'ShutdownRequested' property to 'true'. This method is used rather than a public virtual method to ensure that the value of ShutdownRequested is set to true.

params.name: shutdownHost
params.doc: Set this parameter to true to shutdown the host application.

methods.name: ShutDownCore(bool)

methods.name: Start
methods.summary: Start DynamoModel with all default configuration options

methods.name: Start(Dynamo.Models.DynamoModel.IStartConfiguration)
methods.summary: Start DynamoModel with custom configuration. Defaults will be assigned not provided.

properties.name: AuthenticationManager
properties.summary: Returns authentication manager object for oxygen authentication.

properties.name: CERLocation
properties.summary: The Autodesk CrashReport tool location on disk (directory that contains the "cer.dll")

properties.name: CLIMode
properties.summary: CLIMode indicates if we are running in DynamoCLI or DynamoWPFCLI mode. Note that in CLI mode Scheduler is synchronous.

properties.name: ClipBoard
properties.summary: The copy/paste clipboard.

properties.name: ConnectorType
properties.summary: Specifies how connectors are displayed in Dynamo.

properties.name: CurrentWorkspace
properties.summary: The active workspace in Dynamo.

properties.name: EnableMigrationLogging
properties.summary: Setting this flag enables creation of an XML in following format that records node mapping information - which old node has been converted to which to new node(s)

properties.name: EngineController
properties.summary: DesignScript VM EngineController, used for this instance of Dynamo.

properties.name: ExtensionManager
properties.summary: Manages all extensions for Dynamo

properties.name: HostAnalyticsInfo
properties.summary: Host analytics info

properties.name: HostVersion
properties.summary: Current Version of the Host (i.e. DynamoRevit/DynamoStudio)

properties.name: IsCrashing
properties.summary: Specifies whether or not Dynamo is in a crash-state.

properties.name: IsHeadless
properties.summary: Flag to indicate that there is no UI on this process, and things like the node index process, update manager and the analytics collection should be disabled.

properties.name: IsShowingConnectorTooltip
properties.summary: Flag specifying the current state of whether or not to show tooltips in the graph. In addition to this toggle, tooltip is only available when connectors are set to 'bezier' mode.

properties.name: IsShowingConnectors
properties.summary: Specifies whether connectors are displayed in Dynamo.

properties.name: IsTestMode
properties.summary: Testing flag is used to defer calls to run in the idle thread with the assumption that the entire test will be wrapped in an idle thread call.

properties.name: LinterManager
properties.summary: Manages the active linter

properties.name: PathManager
properties.summary: The path manager that configures path information required for Dynamo to function properly. See IPathManager interface for more details.

properties.name: PreferenceSettings
properties.summary: Preference settings for this instance of Dynamo.

properties.name: Scheduler
properties.summary: The Dynamo Scheduler, handles scheduling of asynchronous tasks on different threads.

properties.name: ShutdownRequested
properties.summary: Flag specifying whether a shutdown of Dynamo was requested.

properties.name: State
properties.summary: The modelState tels us if the RevitDynamoModel was started and if has the the Dynamo UI attached to it or not

properties.name: TraceReconciliationProcessor
properties.summary: An object which implements the ITraceReconciliationProcessor interface, and is used for handlling the results of a trace reconciliation.

properties.name: Version
properties.summary: This version of Dynamo.

properties.name: Workspaces
properties.summary: Returns collection of visible workspaces in Dynamo

events.name: CleaningUp
events.summary: An event triggered when the workspace is being cleaned.

events.name: DeletionComplete
events.summary: Occurs after items of workspace are removed

events.name: DeletionStarted
events.summary: Occurs before items of workspace are removed

events.name: DynamoReady
events.summary: This event is raised when Dynamo is ready for user interaction.

events.name: EvaluationCompleted
events.summary: An event triggered when a single graph evaluation completes.

events.name: PropertyChanged
events.summary: Occurs when a property of DynamoModel is changed

events.name: RefreshCompleted
events.summary: An event triggered when all tasks in scheduler are completed.

events.name: RequestCancelActiveStateForNode
events.summary: Called when current state of a node is canelled.

events.name: RequestDispatcherBeginInvoke
events.summary: Occurs when an action needs to be invoked asynchronously on a Dispather

events.name: RequestDispatcherInvoke
events.summary: Occurs when an action needs to be invoked on a Dispather

events.name: RequestLayoutUpdate
events.summary: Occurs when changes in data may affect UI and UI needs to be refreshed

events.name: RequestNodeSelect
events.summary: An event which requests that a node be selected

events.name: RequestWorkspaceBackUpSave
events.summary: Occurs when a workspace is scheduled to be saved to a backup file.

events.name: RequestsCrashPrompt
events.summary: DynamoModel.RequestsCrashPrompt

events.name: RequestsRedraw
events.summary: DynamoModel.RequestsRedraw

events.name: RunCompleted
events.summary: Occurs when running is completed

events.name: ShutdownCompleted
events.summary: This event is raised after DynamoModel has been shut down. At this point the DynamoModel is no longer valid and access to it should be avoided.

events.name: ShutdownStarted
events.summary: This event is raised right before the shutdown of DynamoModel started. When this event is raised, the shutdown is guaranteed to take place (i.e. user has had a chance to save the work and decided to proceed with shutting down Dynamo). Handlers of this event can still safely access the DynamoModel, the WorkspaceModel (along with its contents), and the DynamoScheduler.

events.name: WorkspaceAdded
events.summary: Called when a workspace is added.

events.name: WorkspaceCleared
events.summary: Occurs after current workspace is cleared

events.name: WorkspaceClearing
events.summary: Occurs before current workspace is cleared

events.name: WorkspaceClearingStarted
events.summary: Occurs before current workspace is cleared

events.name: WorkspaceHidden
events.summary: Event called when a workspace is hidden

events.name: WorkspaceOpened
events.summary: Occurs when a workspaces is opened

events.name: WorkspaceOpening
events.summary: Event that is fired during the opening of the workspace. Use the XmlDocument object provided to conduct additional workspace opening operations.

events.name: WorkspaceRemoveStarted
events.summary: Occurs before a workspace is removed

events.name: WorkspaceRemoved
events.summary: Occurs after a workspace is removed

events.name: WorkspaceSaved
events.summary: Occurs when a workspace is saved to a file.

events.name: WorkspaceSaving
events.summary: Occurs when a workspace is about to be saved to a file.
